---
name: Methodology question / proposal
about: Discuss or propose a change to the PRS methodology
title: '[methodology] '
labels: methodology
assignees: ''
---

## Section

Which methodology section is this about? (e.g., "§4.1 Security", "§6.2 Multiple Comparisons")

## Question / Proposal

State the question or proposal clearly.

## Rationale

Why does this matter? What problem does it solve?

## Suggested Resolution

If proposing a change, what would the new text or scoring look like?

## Backwards Compatibility

Would this change affect scores from prior cycles? If yes, how should historical comparisons be labeled?
